programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Python Swim
programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert & The Rattlesnakes
programme.desc: Robert wrangles Western Diamondback rattlesnakes in Arizona for the first time, learning techniques.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi Says Yes!
programme.desc: As Bindi celebrates her 21st birthday, she gets a surprise proposal from her boyfriend, Chandler. Meanwhile, things get dangerous as Robert wrangles gators in thick mud. Terri helps with the momentous birth of a baby white rhino.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Wedding
programme.desc: Bindi and Chandler prepare for the happiest day of their lives. Weeks before their wedding day, the coronavirus pandemic causes them to make difficult and drastic changes to the wedding of their dreams, but in the end love prevails.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: discovery+ 1st Look: New Start
programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the global pandemic, the Irwins race to prepare for the re-opening of the zoo. Robert helps deliver a litter of newborn tiger cubs, while Bindi handles a sudden crisis at the wildlife hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert Trains a Dragon
programme.desc: Robert and Indah, a Komodo dragon, participate in an exciting research experiment. Terri tries to save a koala joey with a zero percent chance of survival. Bindi friends a childhood favourite spot- Oregon Coast Aquarium.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Alligator Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Robert feeds 44 hungry alligators, all at the same time. Terri helps examine Kaitlynn the tiger and makes a thrilling discovery, while Bindi follows the heartbreaking story of her old friends, Zambezi the Zebra.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: discovery+ 1st Look: New Start
programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the global pandemic, the Irwins race to prepare for the re-opening of the zoo. Robert helps deliver a litter of newborn tiger cubs, while Bindi handles a sudden crisis at the wildlife hospital.

programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Salt Flat Rod
programme.desc: A hot rod lover from California challenges Steve to transform a 1931 Ford Model A into a salt flats racing machine, but getting it done before his client returns to Vegas will take a miracle.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Ranch Rod
programme.desc: Steve digs back into his Montana roots to build his cowboy buddy J.R. the ultimate ranch-rod by Frankenstein-ing together a pair of vintage Dodge trucks.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Fruit Rod
programme.desc: When a California fruit farmer with a taste for hot rods asks Steve for a 1954 GMC COE truck he decides to take it over the top; with a 1200-horsepower engine mounted behind the cab, the crew begin their love affair with the baddest truck ever made.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Mack Rod
programme.desc: Guns and gators are on the menu when a Texan house mover brings Steve his family treasure: a 1938 Big Rig Mack Truck cab that's one step from the grave.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Electro Rod
programme.desc: When a client brings Steve a 1928 Buick filled with rotten wood, his excitement at rat-rodding an original 'gangster' car soon fades when he learns his client wants it to be an electric car.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Pickup Rod
programme.desc: Steve yanks a 1949 Ford F1 out of a farmer's field and battles to transform it into an eye-popping promotional vehicle with a cowboy-biker theme for a couple of his dad's old friends.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: Bracket two race kicks off with sixteen new drivers, including No Prep King Champ Ryan Martin and Memphis leader JJ The Boss. A fresh section of road challenges every driver to put down his fast pass.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Gimme the Loot
programme.desc: It's not over for the 12 racers who lost in bracket 2, and tonight, they're fighting to stay alive in the competition. Having to race over and over is tearing some cars apart, and racers must try not to lose before they even get to the starting line.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Paid in Full
programme.desc: Mega Cash Days continues into Bracket 3 and all eyes are on Big Chief and Daddy Dave who are lining up in Round 1. Chief has never been able to beat Dave in a Cash Days and tonight he's trying to break the curse.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Melissa M's Story
programme.desc: Melissa has isolated herself at home and lost many friends to avoid feeling the shame of what her food addiction has done to her body. Now, the only way to get her life back is to leave it behind to start a new one with Dr. Now's help in Houston.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Strong or Being a Bitch
programme.desc: Janelle gathers Kody and the wives to talk about their increasingly tense family dynamic. Kody gets honest and says he doesn't want to advocate for polygamy anymore, and Robyn and Christine open up about their own insecurities as they question everything.

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Big Launch
programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication

programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows that food trucks have surged in popularity recently, so he's bringing in three teams of food truck chefs to battle it out for Flavortown superiority.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD-licious Burgers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his favorite burger chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives to compete in Flavortown and grill, baby, grill. First, Guy has the chefs shop for ingredients in their signature burger and loaded fries combo using only tongs and a grill lid.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Salute the Troops
programme.desc: Guy honours America's men and women in uniform by inviting four military vets with a culinary second-calling to play his GGG games. They'll be joining forces with the Messlords, a group of DDD chefs who travel the world cooking for our troops.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy Cooks the Games: GGG Raw
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gets a taste of the GGG experience when his son Hunter makes him watch and cook along to a special behind-the-scenes episode of Guy's Grocery Games. Guy tries to keep up with all the challenges, curve balls and chaos of the game.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: This Ain't No Yolk
programme.desc: The recruits learn how to cook an elaborate breakfast spread. Then they hope to earn a spot in the finale as they execute dishes requested by their loved ones and serve them family-style for the remaining recruits and chefs Anne Burrell and Carla Hall.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: How You Bean?
programme.desc: Food Network's Damaris Phillips and Sunny Anderson show up to light a torch under Bobby Flay's stove and set his kitchen ablaze. Chefs Brian Lopes and Jesse Wykle go head-to-head for a chance to make waves in Bobby's kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Whiz Kids
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and kid chefs Gibson Borelli and Tyler Zager have just one homework assignment: beat Bobby Flay! They'll see to it that either California restaurateur Claud Beltran or first-time dad Brian Santos has what it takes.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Hit Him Again

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Dad's Sticky Ribs and Decadent Cookies
programme.desc: Michael turns the backyard grill into a smoker to make his dad's favourite sticky ribs. Then, he makes grilled potato salad as his wife turns his dad's obsession with chocolate into giant cookies infuses with chocolate, crunchy pretzel and sea salt.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Seasoned Pros

programme.title: The Kitchen: Lovin' in the Oven

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: The One About Puppies and Kitties

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Spring in the Great Outdoors: Team Challenges
programme.desc: It's team challenge week, and the eight bakers grab a buddy to spring into the outdoors. First, they bake tasty hand-held treats for a hike. Then it's time for a bike ride as each baker must make a Paris-Brest wheel.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Deadly Spill
programme.desc: In Texas, Ataya and Wood must handle young jet skiers bending the rules, and Warden McGee investigates a major gasoline spill. Meanwhile, Wardens Boone and Noxon come to the rescue of a boater stranded on the Trinity River.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparking Disaster
programme.desc: During wildfire season, Game Warden Dustin Delgado catches people throwing out lit cigarettes and stops them in their tracks. Game Warden Cynde Aguilar helps hunt down the criminal of a high-speed chase, and a call is made about a gator lurking in a pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Rattled
programme.desc: In Jasper County, Game Warden Boone responds to a venomous rattlesnake. Game wardens investigate the illegal killing of a goose in the Texas Panhandle. In South Texas, Game Wardens follow up on a tip about a man going over the fishing limit.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparking Disaster
programme.desc: During wildfire season, Game Warden Dustin Delgado catches people throwing out lit cigarettes and stops them in their tracks. Game Warden Cynde Aguilar helps hunt down the criminal of a high-speed chase, and a call is made about a gator lurking in a pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Deadly Spill
programme.desc: In Texas, Ataya and Wood must handle young jet skiers bending the rules, and Warden McGee investigates a major gasoline spill. Meanwhile, Wardens Boone and Noxon come to the rescue of a boater stranded on the Trinity River.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppies and a Piggy

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Pee Battle

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert Trains a Dragon
programme.desc: Robert and Indah, a Komodo dragon, participate in an exciting research experiment. Terri tries to save a koala joey with a zero percent chance of survival. Bindi friends a childhood favourite spot- Oregon Coast Aquarium.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Sloth Couples Therapy
programme.desc: Sloths Tina and Rico live together at the zoo, spending up to 18 hours a day asleep. For the past three years, Tina has spent her waking moments giving Rico a hard time. Now there's a plan to try and bring them closer together.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Coolest Treehouse Ever Built
programme.desc: Pete and the team tackle a treehouse for two tastemakers in Maine. Featuring a full wall of windows that opens up to the outdoors and a towering rooftop crow's-nest, this could be Pete's coolest treehouse ever built.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Winds of Trade
programme.desc: Renowned sea life painter Guy Harvey asks the crew to build their largest tank to date for the Trade Winds Resort in St. Pete Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Street Dog Named Desire
programme.desc: When a reputed dog napper dumps a dog at Villalobos, Mariah scrambles to find the owner. A new parolee needs Tia's help when he realizes he is in over his head. And, after having her last adoption fall through, Smack has a second chance at a loving home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Incomparable Dr. K
programme.desc: An outbreak of disease in the swamps threatens the dogs,Tania goes out on her own to save a stray pit from the streets and is faced with a difficult rescue, and after years of waiting for a forever home, Jackson finally gets his shot.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Movie: Traffik

programme.desc: A New Orleans couple is looking for a vacation home in Laurel to be closer to her mom, and their ideal house needs space for hosting crawfish boils. Ben and Erin transform a dated home into a modern oasis complete with two kitchens and a spectacular pool.

programme.title: Home Town: Memory Lane: Restoring a Craftsman
programme.desc: A couple from Alabama is excited to settle down in a small town for the next phase of their lives. Ben and Erin help them choose a forever home and give it a historic renovation complete with a gorgeous master suite, custom kitchen and screened-in porch.

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are eager to welcome a new pediatrician who hopes to settle down with his wife and work in the beautiful community. The couple wants a historical charmer with room to grow and a spacious outdoor area for entertaining.

programme.desc: An artist wants to raise her teenage son in the small town near their friends and family. With a budget of up to $200,000, her wish list includes plenty of room to welcome visitors and a dedicated art studio.

programme.desc: A neoclassical colonial gets a classic Tamara Day rehab. Tamara brings her unique design style to this home updating a kitchen, parlor and breakfast nook while keeping the historic charm intact on every level.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: On Par For Glory
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a 1960s Colonial home that's lacking character. She brings the property's potential to life by designing spaces to enjoy the outdoors and incredible views. Then, she creates a stunning kitchen and makes sure light pours into every room.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Soffit Saga
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a 1979 property with a confusing style. She opens up sight lines by removing soffits in the living room and kitchen, and she pulls out the midcentury modern design with elements like shiplap and brass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Race to the Finish
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1952 Traditional home with a massive open concept living space. She triples the size of the mudroom and chooses a stunning surround for the living room fireplace. Later, Tamara and her dad race to find the perfect dining table.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: On the Wings of a Dovetail
programme.desc: Tamara renovates an '80s home in need of some TLC by adding her unique style to the front and back yards. Then, she removes dated elements throughout the house and creates a breathtaking kitchen and main suite bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Can't See the House From the Trees

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake: Out of the Darkness
programme.desc: The body of Kathy Blair, a choir director, is found stabbed to death in her bedroom in Austin, Texas. The gruesome crime scene puzzles investigators until an unlikely clue captured in the darkness puts them on the trail of a depraved killer.

programme.title: Exhumed: Bones of Truth

programme.title: Dateline: The Day She Disappeared

programme.title: Dateline: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: When a prominent couple is found murdered on their Nebraska farm, the investigation is upended by the discovery at the crime scene of a small, golden ring.

programme.title: Dateline: In the Dead of Night

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The 3rd Choir
programme.desc: When the team learns that someone from their past is targeting one of their own, they desperately search the city. Meanwhile, Operational Psychologist Nate Getz visits Nell to help her through her traumatic experience.

programme.title: NCIS: Fake It 'Til You Make It

programme.title: NCIS: Burden of Proof

programme.desc: Stewie and Brian compete for the inheritance of a wealthy, older heiress. Meanwhile, Peter and Chris battle for Mr. Herbert's affection.

programme.desc: A dangerous stretch of water in the Mediterranean is the resting place of an infamous sunken ship, and using the latest tech, Celine and Fabien Cousteau investigate if it was deliberately attacked by spies on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate the man accused of forging evidence of Vikings in America, testing a crucial piece of evidence with DNA analysis: an ancient skull that may have alien origins.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mysteries in the Vault
programme.desc: Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard must help a forensic geologist who informs them of new, advanced testing that could verify the authenticity of the runestone, but a new challenge might put their investigation in jeopardy.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Discovery on the Edge
programme.desc: Bringing scholars and skeptics together to solve the mystery of the Kensington Runestone.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: The Breakthrough
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard gain access to runestone samples for the forensic geologist to conduct testing, and they meet with an archaeo-physics team that finds metal artifacts buried at the site where the runestone was discovered.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mystery on Runestone Hill
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard begin a brand-new excavation at the mysterious Runestone Hill; what they find could change the course of their investigation.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: The Sinner
programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Bound by Murder
programme.desc: It's Christmas when a stranger walks into Deanna's grandmother's home, holding them hostage. On the run, he's left a bloody trail in his wake, borne from his obsession with a young mother.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is savagely murdered while fishing along the Platte River.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Still Haunts Me
programme.desc: An extended interview with Gwen Bailey, who married Norman Starnes thinking she landed the most eligible bachelor in town. Years later, she discovered she never really knew him at all, but by then, she was already his unwilling accomplice.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Where Evil Grows
programme.desc: A charming 20-year-old wants to help authorities with a murder investigation. He claims to have met one of the three victims and says he has no knowledge of the crime, but detectives suspect otherwise.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: The Criminal Caregiver
programme.desc: After a vulnerable elderly man is brutalized in his rural home, John joins a thrilling manhunt for Derek Whisenand. And when newlywed bliss turns into a vicious crime, Cal goes boots on the ground on the trail of fugitive Arnoldo Jimenez.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Still Haunts Me
programme.desc: An extended interview with Gwen Bailey, who married Norman Starnes thinking she landed the most eligible bachelor in town. Years later, she discovered she never really knew him at all, but by then, she was already his unwilling accomplice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: The Criminal Caregiver
programme.desc: After a vulnerable elderly man is brutalized in his rural home, John joins a thrilling manhunt for Derek Whisenand. And when newlywed bliss turns into a vicious crime, Cal goes boots on the ground on the trail of fugitive Arnoldo Jimenez.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is savagely murdered while fishing along the Platte River.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mom Makes Four
programme.desc: When Carla Fuqua vanishes after a night out with friends, her family panics. She's a dedicated mother who would never leave her son behind. Even worse, Carla has become the fourth missing person in a town of less than 5,000.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lord of the Rockies
programme.desc: Residents of Guffey, Colorado cherish their tiny mountain outpost for one reason - the peaceful Rocky Mountain surroundings. That peace is shattered one January night when Carl and JoAnna Dutcher are massacred alongside their grandson, Tony.

programme.title: True Crime With Aphrodite Jones: A Deadly Dream
programme.desc: A beloved small town city worker is gunned down at work.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Mystery, Heartbreak and Justice
programme.desc: Many stories don't end when the jury delivers its verdict. Three amazing cases where the quest for justice rages on.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In The Dead of Night
programme.desc: Police must retrace a teenager's last known movements if they hope to find out when and where she crossed paths with her killer.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Night Crawlers
programme.desc: A Southern California college freshman is gunned down in her family's home, and her older sister won't rest until she finds the people responsible.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Blood Mountain
programme.desc: Meredith Emerson decides to celebrate the new year by hiking on Georgia's Blood Mountain with her dog, Ella. When Meredith goes missing and Ella is found 60 miles away, an all-out search begins.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Kill Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: It's a brutal scene when Karen Gregory is raped and stabbed in her boyfriend's Florida home. Detective Larry Tosi enlists the help of his firefighter friend to solve the crime. What comes next is something no detective wants to hear.

programme.title: The 1990s: The Deadliest Decade: Soldier of Misfortune
programme.desc: Pvt. Tracie McBride has just arrived for military intelligence training when she's kidnapped from a laundry room at Goodfellow Air Force Base in Texas. A hunt for the missing soldier leads to a tale of horror involving a decorated war vet.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Dog Days of Murder
programme.desc: When Billings, Montana firefighters respond to a duplex consumed in flames, two bound and gagged bodies are found inside. With their housemate nowhere to be found, police aren't sure if they're searching for the killer or another victim.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Revenge With a Bullet
programme.desc: After motorists spot a man's body burning on the side of the highway, investigators find evidence of a brutal assassination and fiery cover-up. Detectives decode construction debris with curious details to reveal a scheme that ended in murder.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fix Up on Deep Creek
programme.desc: A couple heads back to their favourite spot from their college days, searching for a new vacation home. They seek a fixer upper they can customize with three bedrooms, an open concept design and a large outdoor living space with easy lake access.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Ramshackle Cabin Into a Guest House In Missouri
programme.desc: The guys take down and rebuild a historic 170-year-old cabin. Sherman leads the guys in converting this cabin into a guest house for kindred spirit client, Mark Perry.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A Barnwood Miracle
programme.desc: The Mt. Olivet Church has been the heart of Pocahontas County, WV for 137 years. The old log structure is struggling to survive, so Mark and the guys are called in to take it down and restore it. As the job ends, the community pulls off a surprise ending.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Cabin Dream Come True
programme.desc: Tammy Harrah and her late husband dreamed of running a craft store in a log cabin on their West Virginia family homestead. The guys make this dream come true for her and her son building a cabin for them and making some homemade crafts for the store.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Doubleheader
programme.desc: Mark splits up his crew so they can conquer two jobs at the same time. Johnny and Tim take down a big tobacco barn that has plenty of antique material worth salvaging, while Graham and Alex tackle a log cabin that's still in great shape.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Fit for a King
programme.desc: Eddie tries over the top dishes kit for a king.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Let Them Eat Sweets
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows there's one flavor that's always exciting - sweets! It doesn't matter if it's fruity, chocolatey or pure unadulterated sugar, there are endless ways to hit the sweet spot. So get your sweet tooth ready!

programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are sold on Birmingham, Alabama's, Southern hospitality and amazing eats! At the charming 1950s hot dog shop Gus's Hot Dogs, the duo feasts on a spicy wiener packed with decidedly Southern flavors and spices.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on Bourbon Street
programme.desc: Bobby Flay pays tribute to America's tastiest block with a brunch for Bourbon Street.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: New Orleans Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a culinary walk through New Orleans' French Quarter for this brunch that's perfect anytime of the day.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bold Southwestern Brunch
programme.desc: A Southwestern brunch includes Texas eggs benedict and cast iron home fries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Winter Weekend Brunch
programme.desc: It may be chilly outside his kitchen, but inside Bobby Flay prepares a warm and hearty brunch that's perfect for entertaining on those cold weekend mornings.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Charleston, S.C., where he smokes a whole hog on a supersized indoor smoke pit and devours a slow-smoked rib-eye steak sandwich complete with melted cheddar and caramelized onions.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.desc: Voice shares stories of Chinese celebrities aimed to educate youth.

programme.title: China Showbiz
programme.desc: View into the fabulous world of arts through works appreciation and review.

programme.title: Discoveries
programme.desc: Track certain ancestors to identify and interpret mysteries and cultural implications contained in physical and human geographies.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Chinese traditional culture reveals life in villages in the way of story-telling.

programme.title: China News
programme.desc: The latest news and social changes happening in China and all over the world.

programme.title: Maury: DNA Will Prove I Have 2 Kids With Your Fiancé!
programme.desc: Two of Diane's children are being denied by two different men. Cindy is back to see if her ex Steve is the dad. William is denying Tonia's second daughter, and he got his mistress pregnant.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Fish for Breakfast
programme.desc: In an effort to boost their chances of getting pregnant, Molly encourages Mike to join her in giving up caffeine and eating healthier, causing them both to have major withdrawals.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gorilla Warfare
programme.desc: Doug is forced to come up with an original romantic phrase to use on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Sax Problem
programme.desc: When Earl is not invited to play with his old jazz band at their reunion show, Max and the diner gang join forces in order to get him back on stage.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackée Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Black-ish: Please Don't Feed the Animals
programme.desc: Bow keeps in touch with Dre's incarcerated godbrother, Omar, but when they find out he is being released from prison, Omar's future sparks debate. Meanwhile, Ruby lets it slip to the kids that she's been to jail and they push her to tell them more.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Johnson Show
programme.desc: Dre has always strived to mirror his life after the model families he grew up watching on TV. When news spreads that Stevens & Lido is going through layoffs, Dre panics that his family's reputation will be tarnished if he loses his job.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Greg Proops 6
programme.desc: Guest comedian is Greg Proops.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Greg Proops 7
programme.desc: Guest star is Greg Proops.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: Fool Us: Niagara Fools
programme.desc: Featured magicians include: Greg Frewin, Dyna Staats, Matt Marcy and Guilherme Silveira.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Finale
programme.desc: While trapped in a small Massachusetts town, the gang gets caught in a legal entanglement.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Marine Biologist
programme.desc: Jerry tells an old classmate that George is a marine biologist and George plays along.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It's Always Nazi Week
programme.desc: When Judith kicks Herb to the curb, Alan comes knocking.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bazinga! That's From a TV Show
programme.desc: When Jake cheats on his girlfriend with her 18-year-old daughter, Alan and Walden get caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Snow Day
programme.desc: When a snow day cancels school, Adam and Barry discover Murray has a fear of snow. When the boys realize this, they exploit his weakness and take advantage of him. Meanwhile, Beverly finds Erica's college application lauding her mom as her hero.

programme.title: Mom: Mahjong Sally and the Ecstasy
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie don't know who to believe when they hear conflicting stories about Violet and Gregory's break-up.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: A House Divided
programme.desc: When Mike and Vanessa ask newlyweds Mandy and Kyle to tone down their constant displays of affection, Mandy agrees but only if her parents become more discreet in the way they express their feelings to each other.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Fixer
programme.desc: Mike hopes to get brothers-in-law Ryan and Kyle to learn how to fix things around the house by pitting them against one another. Meanwhile, Eve is caught off-guard when her boyfriend tells her that he loves her.

programme.title: Mom: Chicken Nuggets and a Triple Homicide
programme.desc: In order to get the family back together, Christy and Bonnie rent a house with a colourful past. Meanwhile, Bonnie tries to broker peace between Christy and Alvin.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Sanbona Wildlife Reserve
programme.desc: Jack and his family visit the Sanbona Wildlife Reserve and have unique animal experiences in store. They see three leopards hunting together and a family of baboons who live on the cliffs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Into the Cloud Forest
programme.desc: Jack heads into the mystical and mysterious Mashpi cloud forest in Ecuador, where the rainforest meets the Andes Mountains. The forest is buzzing with hundreds of hummingbirds, bats, snakes and butterflies.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: The Littlest Elephants
programme.desc: Jack sees pygmy elephants emerge from the rain forest by the Sukau River on the island of Borneo. Then, jack spots proboscis monkeys, a camouflaged pit viper, and curious long-tailed macaques.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Mixing the Old and New
programme.desc: The 1720 front door is restored, a 1300-pound marble island top arrives, a new zone damper system is installed, a furniture maker creates a custom table top out of reclaimed joists and the brick hearth is installed with reclaimed bricks.

programme.title: Best Friends Furever With Kel Mitchell: Bovine Buddies
programme.desc: A lab finds his posse in two happy guinea pigs. Plus, a dog becomes best buds with a cow who steers him in the right direction.

programme.title: Tails of Valor: Work Like a Dog
programme.desc: A lab becomes the lifeline that gets one woman back on her feet. Plus, one service dog does more than her handler could ever ask for.

programme.title: COVID-19 & Communities of Color
programme.desc: A panel discusses how COVID-19 is impacting the Black/brown community, they dispel myths about the COVID-19 vaccine, emphasize the importance of getting tested and following protocols and addresses mistrust with the healthcare system.

programme.title: Raw Travel: Socially Conscious Colombia
programme.desc: In socially conscious Colombia, Rob meets some amazing and caring people striving to make a difference.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Student Doubt
programme.desc: When Mandy worries about Kyle passing his first college exam, she secretly enlists Vanessa, Jen and Ryan to help tutor him. Meanwhile, Mike learns of Ed and Chuck’s superstition involving their decision-making.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: This Too Shall Bass
programme.desc: After finding out that Ed is skipping Outdoorman's Annual Bass Festival for Bonnie's fancy art gala, Mike attempts to convince his mother-in-law to have a change of heart.

programme.title: Black-ish: Charity Case
programme.desc: Dre is chosen to lead Stevens and Lido's new charity campaign which helps people give back to their community.

programme.title: Black-ish: Super Rich Kids
programme.desc: Dre has always felt his older son was never like him, but when he finally meets Junior's cool friends, Dre is all in and happy that his son may have the opportunity for an actual social life.

programme.desc: The guys check out a collection of sketches from the 1954 Sam Sheppard trial. The man who inspired 'The Fugitive,' is Rick willing to deliver a verdict on these rare drawings?

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: This Just In
programme.desc: A socially awkward teenage girl arrives at a new school and falls quickly into a group of rather electric friends, each with their own quirks. They find they have a unique bond, all centering around the school's television channel.

programme.title: Veterans' Voices: Honoring Those Who Serve
programme.desc: Veterans' voices honours our nation's cherished veterans and all those who serve in every branch of our military.

programme.title: Roads to Freedom
programme.desc: This special reveals some historic sites in the Washington, D.C. area that you may never have heard of, let alone visited. It examines Harper's Ferry where John Brown stuck a dagger in the heart of slavery, and the battlefields of Petersburg, Virginia.

programme.title: Founding Mothers
programme.desc: Profiles of several African American women from the Washington, D.C. area who, over the last two centuries, have forged new rights and freedoms for their children, grandchildren, and generations beyond their respective lifetimes.

programme.title: Batwoman: Gore on Canvas
programme.desc: Batwoman is approached by Commander Kane and Agent Moore to boost an infamous work of art that reveals the way to Coryana and Kate. Alice attempts to fulfill Safiyah's insidious request.

programme.title: Charmed: You Can't Touch This
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones encounter a new, magical obstacle as they try to relaunch themselves in a human world.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Maid
programme.desc: When Jerry starts a relationship with his new maid, the cleaning is quickly forgotten.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Seinfeld Chronicles
programme.desc: Jerry is excited about an impending visit from a girl he met on the road. But Jerry is soon disappointed when he finds out she is engaged.

programme.title: Mom: Pilot
programme.desc: A newly sober single mother is trying to get her life together. She is challenged when her estranged mother, Bonnie comes back into the picture.

programme.title: Mom: A Pee Stick and An Asian Raccoon
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie set aside their difference to deal with a family crisis together.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Sophie Doll
programme.desc: When the girls take a bartending class in order to add cocktails to their dessert bar menu, Caroline must think quickly when she has to take the class exam solo after Max gets chicken pox. Also, Sophie creates a creepy lookalike video monitor doll.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Jumping Off Point
programme.desc: Sharon and the team investigate the murder of a young man pushed off the top of a parking structure who was somehow able to afford a high-end apartment without any visible means of support.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Fights City Hall
programme.desc: Monk becomes involved in the disappearance of a city official that could have effect on Trudy's murder.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Lee Daniels, Carey Mulligan, Jared Leto, Gary Anthony Williams, the stars of ‘Ginny and Georgia’ Leslie Odom Jr., Paul Ogata, Paul Bettany, Lauren Ambrose, Kelvin Harrison Jr., and Sabrina Carpenter.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Her's and Her's and His!/ You Ran Over My Dog
programme.desc: Woman sues over price of wedding gift; man sues for vet bills for dog.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Egg Donor Dupe/ Making a Stand at a Concert
programme.desc: A woman backs out of an agreement; a man ruins a woman's concert experience.

programme.title: Protection Court: Asking for a Friend/ Her Nephew Stole From Him
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Ban the Mariachi Band/ A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Woman sues over breach of contract; plaintiff sues over fence.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Mayo vs. Brown
programme.desc: A Jonesboro, Georgia mother of twins testifies that a Riverdale, Georgia man is more that just a friend - he is the father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Cameron vs. Melvin
programme.desc: A Houston, TX woman is claims that her recently deceased ex is the father of her 2-year-old baby - but his sister is certain another man is the father.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Sylvia says Christopher failed to pay her back for the down payment on a car, tires, lost wages, and the insurance deductible after crashing into his parked car while drag racing. Christopher says his insurance paid for the damages to her car.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her cousin for rent and a stolen TV and claims she walked around the house in skimpy attire in front of her boyfriend.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Letting His Lady Friend Down ' and 'Party Pooper.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'It's Not Nice to Make Your Brother Mad.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Ice Skating Impediment/ Park Somewhere Else
programme.desc: An ice skater is injured and blames the overcrowded rink; a tandem parking spot leads to a dispute between roommates.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Kelly is suing Marcus for personal loans and bills he allegedly acquired while they were in a relationship. Marcus says he paid Kelly back and that's she's doing this due to his refusal to answer the phone or have sex with her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Mom Is Married to A Child Predator
programme.desc: When Carrie’s daughter was 3 years old, Carrie suspected she was being molested. The man she suspected, Tommy, is married to her mother, Annette and the two often watched Carrie’s daughter. The family has been torn asunder because of this accusation.

programme.title: Maury: I Can't Make a Baby With 3 Thumbs ... DNA Will Prove It!
programme.desc: Linnece and her boyfriend David were elated when she became pregnant, but his sister started a smear campaign that worked and now David is denying his son. Cynthia's husband has been accusing her of cheating for a long time, and is now denying both kids.

programme.desc: Amy doesn’t want to let jealousy get in the way. She gave her boyfriend Kevin a threesome for his birthday. Sadly, Amy now believes Kevin is cheating on her with the third member of their threesome.

programme.title: Movie: Maximum Overdrive
programme.desc: After a comet passes the Earth, machines come to life and terrorize humans. A group of people, trapped at a truck stop by marauding big rigs, must find away to stop the machines.

programme.title: Movie: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, cutters shape the digitally recorded memories of the dead into narratives that can be watched by their bereaved loved ones. While editing a wealthy and powerful client's memories, a cutter comes across dangerous information.
